features.name: Splash Screen
features.description: Initial launch screen displaying the Luma brand mark. Handles asset loading and auth state check before routing the user to the appropriate entry point.
features.interaction: Auto-redirects to home if session exists, otherwise to phone auth.

features.name: Value Prop Carousel
features.description: Multi-slide introduction to Luma's core concepts: circles, pairings, and the conversational agent.
features.interaction: User swipes or taps Next to advance. Skip bypasses to auth. Final slide shows Get Started CTA.

features.name: Profile Setup — Name & Photo
features.description: First-run screen collecting the user's first name, last name, and profile photo after account creation.
features.interaction: Photo upload opens device image picker. User can skip photo and add later.

features.name: Profile Setup — Bio & Occupation
features.description: Collects a short bio and occupation to populate the user's profile and inform pairing context.
features.interaction: Free text inputs with character limits. Both fields are optional.

features.name: Profile Setup — Interests
features.description: Tag-selection screen where the user picks interests (e.g. food, travel, basketball). Used by Luma to highlight shared interests between matched pairs.
features.interaction: Tap to select / deselect tags. Minimum selection not enforced but encouraged.

features.name: Profile Setup — City
features.description: Prompts the user to set their city so Luma can surface relevant circles and dinners.
features.interaction: Text search with autocomplete. Selection persists to user profile.

features.name: First Action Prompt
features.description: Post-onboarding screen where Luma agent prompts the user to either join a circle with an invite code or browse circles near them.
features.interaction: Two CTA options: Enter invite code or Browse circles. Luma message sets conversational tone from the start.

features.name: Phone Number Entry
features.description: Primary authentication entry point. Collects the user's mobile number for SMS OTP verification.
features.interaction: Country code selector with flag. Formatted phone input. Submit triggers OTP send.

features.name: OTP Verification
features.description: 6-digit code verification screen sent via SMS to the user's phone number.
features.interaction: Auto-advances between digit inputs. Resend option with cooldown timer. Auto-submits on last digit.

features.name: New vs Returning User Routing
features.description: After OTP verification, system detects whether a user_profiles row exists and routes accordingly — new users go to onboarding, returning users go to home.
features.interaction: Transparent to user. No explicit screen.

features.name: Session Persistence
features.description: Auth session is stored locally so returning users bypass auth on relaunch.
features.interaction: Handled at app launch. User is not asked to re-authenticate unless session expires.

features.name: Sign Out
features.description: Terminates the current session and returns the user to the phone entry screen.
features.interaction: Accessible from Settings. Confirmation prompt before signing out.

features.name: Account Deletion
features.description: Permanently deletes the user's profile and auth record, including all associated data.
features.interaction: Available in Settings. Requires explicit confirmation. Irreversible.

features.name: Luma Agent Feed
features.description: Conversational home screen where the Luma agent surfaces contextual updates — upcoming dinners, pending actions, pairing news, and suggestions. The primary interface for the app.
features.interaction: Scrollable conversation-style feed. User can type or tap quick-reply chips to interact with Luma.

features.name: Confirmed Dinner Card
features.description: Prominent card on home showing the user's next confirmed dinner — circle name, date, time, and venue. Tapping opens the full dinner detail screen.
features.interaction: Tapping the Details button navigates to the confirmed dinner detail screen.

features.name: Open Seats Rail
features.description: Horizontal scrollable rail showing dinners in the user's city that still have open seats. Allows spontaneous seat requests outside of a circle.
features.interaction: Swipe horizontally to browse. Tap Request Seat to express interest.

features.name: Quick Action Grid
features.description: 2x2 grid of entry points: Find a Dinner, My Circles, Start a Circle, My Profile.
features.interaction: Each tile navigates to the corresponding section of the app.

features.name: City Selector
features.description: Dropdown in the top bar allowing the user to switch their active city context, affecting which circles and dinners are surfaced.
features.interaction: Tap city name to open selector. Selection updates feed context immediately.

features.name: Notification Bell
features.description: Bell icon in the top bar with an unread badge count. Tapping opens the notification tray.
features.interaction: Badge clears as notifications are read. Tapping bell opens notification list.

features.name: Profile Avatar
features.description: User's profile photo in the top bar. Tapping navigates to their profile.
features.interaction: Falls back to initials if no photo is set.

features.name: My Circles List
features.description: List of all circles the user belongs to, showing circle name, member count, city, and next dinner date if one is active.
features.interaction: Tap a circle to open its detail screen.

features.name: Circle Discovery — Browse by City
features.description: Browse public circles in a selected city, sorted by member count or recency.
features.interaction: City selector at top. Scrollable list of circle cards with Join button.

features.name: Join Circle — Invite Code Entry
features.description: Luma agent prompts the user to enter a 6-character invite code. Resolves the code and shows a preview of the circle before joining.
features.interaction: User types or pastes code into the agent input. Luma surfaces the circle card with Join and Not Now options.

features.name: Join Circle — Confirmation
features.description: Success state after joining a circle. Luma confirms membership and shows the user's updated circle list.
features.interaction: Luma message confirms. Circle appears in My Circles with a NEW badge.

features.name: Create Circle — Conversational Wizard
features.description: 5-step creation flow driven by the Luma agent: circle name, vibe, city, privacy, and dinner cadence. Each step is a conversational prompt with tap or type input.
features.interaction: User answers each step via typed response or tap selection. Progress is shown as answered fields above.

features.name: Create Circle — Preview & Confirm
features.description: Summary card showing all circle details before creation. User can confirm or go back to edit.
features.interaction: Create Circle button commits. Edit button steps back into the wizard.

features.name: Circle Detail — Member View
features.description: Circle detail screen for regular members. Shows upcoming dinner, member avatars, memories grid, circle badge, and a Luma agent panel for quick actions.
features.interaction: Tap upcoming dinner for details. See all members. Set availability. Browse memories.

features.name: Circle Detail — Admin View
features.description: Extended circle detail for owners and admins. Includes pending join requests, member management, nudge capability, and full settings access.
features.interaction: Review pending requests. Manage members via role and status controls. Access settings.

features.name: Member Management
features.description: Admin capability to promote members to moderator or admin, or block/remove them from the circle.
features.interaction: Long press or action menu on a member row. Role and status changes are confirmed before applying.

features.name: Circle Settings
features.description: Admin-only screen to update circle name, vibe, privacy, pairing frequency, preferred restaurant count, and dinner size limits.
features.interaction: Form-based editing. Changes saved on submit.

features.name: Circle Hashtags
features.description: Admin can add or update hashtag tags for the circle to aid discoverability.
features.interaction: Tag input with autocomplete. Tap X to remove a tag.

features.name: Circle Invite — Share Badge
features.description: Generates a shareable circle badge and invite code. Admin and members can share the badge externally to recruit new members.
features.interaction: Share Badge button opens native share sheet. Copy Code copies the 6-character code to clipboard.

features.name: Circle Memories
features.description: Photo grid within the circle detail showing photos submitted by members from past dinners.
features.interaction: Add Photo opens image picker. Tap photo to view full screen.

features.name: Delete Circle
features.description: Owner-only action to permanently delete the circle and all associated data.
features.interaction: Available in circle settings. Requires explicit confirmation. Irreversible.

features.name: Nudge Members
features.description: Admin capability to send a prompt to members who have not yet set their availability for an upcoming dinner cycle.
features.interaction: Nudge them button appears when unavailable member count is surfaced by Luma.

features.name: Create Dinner Event
features.description: Host creates a new dinner event within a circle. Collects title, venue, address, date and time, group size, vibe, and cancellation policy.
features.interaction: Form or conversational input via Luma. Host is automatically added as the first accepted participant.

features.name: Invite Circle Members
features.description: After creating a dinner event, the host sends invitations to circle members. Members receive a notification and can accept or decline.
features.interaction: Host selects members to invite. All accepted circle members can be bulk-invited.

features.name: Dinner Invite — RSVP Screen
features.description: Screen presented to an invited member showing event details, host name, accepted count with avatars, and Accept / Decline actions.
features.interaction: Accept adds user to the dinner pool. Decline removes them. Luma confirms the outcome conversationally.

features.name: Waiting for Pairs Screen
features.description: Post-accept holding state. Shows the user they are in the pool, how many others have accepted, and when pairs will be announced.
features.interaction: Progress bar showing accepted count. Luma surfaces nudge option if some members haven't responded.

features.name: Event Management — Host View
features.description: Host-facing event detail showing invite response counts, match status, and controls to trigger pairing, edit event details, or cancel the event.
features.interaction: Manage button on circle detail opens this view. Pair Now triggers the matching algorithm.

features.name: Auto-Rotation — Round Tracking
features.description: System tracks which round number a dinner event represents within its circle and auto-advances to the next round when all matches resolve.
features.interaction: Fully automated. Round number displayed on event for admin context.

features.name: Past Dinners
features.description: Archive of completed dinner events within a circle, showing date, venue, and attendance outcomes.
features.interaction: Accessible from circle detail via Past Dinners quick action.

features.name: Pair Reveal — Countdown
features.description: Pre-reveal state shown to guests who have been matched but whose reveal_at timestamp has not yet passed. Shows a countdown to when the pair will be visible.
features.interaction: Read-only countdown display. No actions available until reveal window opens.

features.name: Pair Reveal — Match Card
features.description: Full match reveal showing partner's first name, profile photo, occupation, shared interests, and venue details. Presented by Luma once reveal_at has passed.
features.interaction: Confirm I'll be there locks in attendance. Can't make it opens the decline flow.

features.name: Confirm Match
features.description: Guest confirms they will attend their paired dinner. When both guests confirm, the match is automatically promoted to confirmed status and both are notified.
features.interaction: Single tap action. Luma transitions the conversation to a waiting state until partner also confirms.

features.name: Waiting for Partner Confirmation
features.description: Intermediate state after one guest confirms but the partner has not yet. Shows a live indicator of partner's pending status.
features.interaction: Animated pending indicator. Cancel my spot option remains accessible. Resolves automatically via Realtime when partner confirms.

features.name: Decline Match
features.description: Guest opts out of their assigned pair after reveal. Cancels the match, notifies the partner, and applies the circle's cancellation policy (skip round or requeue).
features.interaction: Can't make it tap opens decline confirmation. Luma explains the outcome based on cancellation policy.

features.name: Partner Declined — Requeue or Skip
features.description: Screen shown when the partner has declined the match. Luma notifies the user and presents options based on the circle's cancellation policy — stay in the pool or sit out the round.
features.interaction: Keep me in re-adds the user to the unmatched pool. Skip this round opts them out gracefully.

features.name: Confirmed Dinner Detail
features.description: Full detail screen once both guests have confirmed. Shows event date and time, venue with map preview, partner profile (full name now visible), and action chips for calendar, check-in, and cancellation.
features.interaction: Get Directions opens native maps. Add to Calendar invokes platform calendar API. Check In chip is disabled until the day-of window opens.

features.name: Add to Calendar
features.description: Adds the confirmed dinner to the user's device calendar with venue, time, partner name, and a deep link back to the dinner detail.
features.interaction: Tap Add to Calendar chip on confirmed detail screen. Native calendar sheet is presented.

features.name: Day-of Check In
features.description: Location-gated check-in available within a configurable window around the dinner start time. Validates the user's device location is within 500m of the venue before recording the check-in.
features.interaction: Check In chip activates when the window opens. Proximity validation runs on submit. Partner's check-in status is shown live.

features.name: Attendance Report
features.description: Post-dinner prompt asking the user whether they attended. Available after the dinner time has passed, up to the reporting deadline (scheduled date + 72 hours). Affects the user's reliability score.
features.interaction: Yes I went increments dinners_attended. Couldn't make it is recorded as a no-show. Luma surfaces a flake score warning before the user confirms a no-show.

features.name: Late Cancellation
features.description: If a user cancels a confirmed match close to the dinner date, a flake score impact warning is shown before the cancellation is processed.
features.interaction: Can't go action on confirmed detail. Confirmation modal with flake score warning. Notifies partner on confirm.

features.name: Odd-Number Pairing
features.description: When the accepted pool has an odd number of participants, the algorithm creates one group of 3 rather than leaving someone unmatched.
features.interaction: Fully automated. Transparent to users except group_size on their match card.

features.name: Repeat Match Prevention
features.description: Pairing algorithm avoids matching two people who have been paired together in a previous round within the same circle.
features.interaction: Fully automated. No user-facing interaction.

features.name: Feedback Prompt
features.description: After a user reports attendance, Luma immediately surfaces a feedback request for the dinner.
features.interaction: Conversational prompt from Luma. User can engage or dismiss.

features.name: Star Rating
features.description: 1–5 star rating of the overall dinner experience.
features.interaction: Tap stars to select rating. Rating is required before submission.

features.name: Quick Tags
features.description: Pre-defined tags the user can select to describe the dinner (e.g. Great conversation, Perfect venue, Would meet again, Too loud).
features.interaction: Tap to select, tap again to deselect. Multiple selections allowed.

features.name: Free Text Note
features.description: Optional open text field for additional comments about the dinner.
features.interaction: Multiline text input. Optional.

features.name: Photo Upload
features.description: Optional photo submission attached to feedback. Photos appear in the circle's Memories grid.
features.interaction: Opens device image picker. Multiple photos can be added. Preview thumbnails shown before submit.

features.name: Feedback Submission
features.description: Submits the completed feedback. Guarded so only users who reported attendance = true can submit.
features.interaction: Submit button. Luma confirms submission and transitions conversation forward.

features.name: Profile Screen
features.description: User's own profile view showing photo, name, bio, occupation, interests, and activity stats (dinners attended, reliability score).
features.interaction: Accessible from home avatar and My Profile quick action.

features.name: Edit Profile
features.description: Inline editing of name, bio, occupation, and interests.
features.interaction: Edit button opens editable fields. Save commits changes.

features.name: Profile Photo Upload
features.description: Upload or replace profile photo from the device camera roll.
features.interaction: Tap avatar to open image picker. Cropping UI before upload. Stored in Supabase storage under the user's ID.

features.name: Interests Management
features.description: Add or remove interest tags from the user's profile.
features.interaction: Tag selector with current selections shown. Changes update user_profiles.interests.

features.name: Availability Settings
features.description: User sets their general availability window (date range and preferred time slots) so Luma can account for it during dinner cycle planning.
features.interaction: Date pickers for start and end date. Multi-select chips for time slots (morning, afternoon, evening).

features.name: Reliability Score Display
features.description: Shows the user their flake score and confidence level (High / Medium / Low Confidence) based on their attendance history.
features.interaction: Read-only display on profile. Tooltip explains what the score means.

features.name: Dinners Attended Counter
features.description: Running total of dinners the user has attended, shown on their profile.
features.interaction: Read-only. Incremented automatically when attendance is reported.

features.name: In-App Notification Feed
features.description: Chronological list of all notifications for the user — dinner invites, pairing updates, match confirmations, attendance reminders, and feedback prompts.
features.interaction: Accessible from the bell icon on home. Tapping a notification routes to the relevant screen. Unread notifications are visually distinguished.

features.name: Unread Badge Count
features.description: Badge on the notification bell reflecting the count of unread notifications. Decrements as notifications are read.
features.interaction: Auto-updates via Realtime. Clears when notification list is opened.

features.name: Push Notifications — FCM
features.description: Firebase Cloud Messaging push notifications delivered to the device for all key events in the dinner and pairing lifecycle.
features.interaction: Tapping the push notification deep-links to the relevant in-app screen.

features.name: Dinner Invite Notification
features.description: Push and in-app notification sent when a user is invited to a dinner event.
features.interaction: Routes to the RSVP screen.

features.name: Waiting for Pairs Notification
features.description: Confirmation notification sent after a user accepts a dinner invite, confirming they are in the pool.
features.interaction: Routes to the waiting screen.

features.name: Pair Ready Notification
features.description: Push and in-app notification sent when the dinner event is paired, prompting users to check their match.
features.interaction: Routes to the pair reveal screen.

features.name: Match Confirmed Notification
features.description: Sent to both guests when the match status transitions to confirmed — i.e. both parties have accepted the pairing.
features.interaction: Routes to the confirmed dinner detail screen.

features.name: Match Cancelled Notification
features.description: Sent to the remaining guest when their partner declines the match. Explains the requeue or skip-round outcome.
features.interaction: Routes to the partner declined screen.

features.name: Attendance Reminder Notification
features.description: Scheduled push notification sent after the dinner time has passed prompting the user to report whether they attended.
features.interaction: Routes to the attendance report screen.

features.name: Feedback Prompt Notification
features.description: Sent after a user reports attendance = true, prompting them to rate and leave feedback for the dinner.
features.interaction: Routes to the feedback screen.

features.name: Notification Routing
features.description: Each notification_type maps to a specific in-app destination. Tapping any notification from cold start or background correctly deep-links to the right screen with the right data loaded.
features.interaction: Handled at the app router level using notification data payload.

features.name: Invite Friends via SMS
features.description: User can invite contacts who are not yet on Luma by selecting from their device contacts. An SMS is sent via Twilio with a personalised invite message.
features.interaction: Opens contact picker. Selected contacts are previewed before sending. Send action records the invite and increments invites_sent_count.

features.name: In-App vs New User Detection
features.description: Before composing an invite, the app checks which selected phone numbers are already registered on Luma, so the user only sends SMS invites to genuinely new contacts.
features.interaction: Already-on-Luma contacts are flagged in the contact picker with their display name.

features.name: Invite Tracking
features.description: Tracks every SMS invite sent including inviter, invitee phone, message body, and delivery status. Displayed in the user's quest or stats context.
features.interaction: Read-only. Invite count visible on profile.

features.name: Settings Screen
features.description: Central settings hub accessible from the user profile. Contains account, notification, and app preference controls.
features.interaction: List-based navigation to sub-settings.

features.name: Push Notification Preferences
features.description: Toggle push notifications on or off at the app level. Links to system notification settings if permission has been denied.
features.interaction: Toggle switch. If off, in-app notifications still work.

features.name: FCM Token Management
features.description: Registers and refreshes the FCM device token on login and token refresh. Token is stored on user_profiles for push targeting.
features.interaction: Fully automated. No user-facing interaction.

features.name: Privacy Settings
features.description: Controls for profile visibility and whether the user can be found in city-based circle discovery.
features.interaction: Toggle switches per privacy option.

features.name: Terms & Privacy Policy
features.description: Links to the Luma terms of service and privacy policy documents.
features.interaction: Opens in-app web view or external browser.

features.name: Sign Out
features.description: Ends the current session and routes to the auth screen.
features.interaction: Confirmation prompt before sign out.

features.name: Delete Account
features.description: Permanently removes the user's profile, auth record, and all associated data.
features.interaction: Requires typing a confirmation phrase. Irreversible.

features.name: Match Guest Confirmation Listener
features.description: Realtime subscription on dinner_match_guests that detects when the partner's confirmed field flips to true. Automatically transitions the waiting screen to the confirmed dinner detail without a manual refresh.
features.interaction: Transparent to user. UI transitions automatically.

features.name: Match Cancellation Listener
features.description: Realtime subscription on dinner_match_guests that detects when the partner's declined_at is set. Surfaces the partner declined screen automatically.
features.interaction: Transparent to user. Luma message appears surfacing the cancellation.

features.name: Check-In Status Listener
features.description: Realtime subscription on dinner_check_ins that updates the partner's check-in status on the day-of check-in screen without requiring a refresh.
features.interaction: Partner status badge updates from Not yet to Checked in live.

features.name: Notification Feed Listener
features.description: Realtime subscription on the notifications table that pushes new notifications into the in-app feed and increments the unread badge without requiring the user to pull-to-refresh.
features.interaction: New notification appears at top of feed. Bell badge increments.
